title: Grilled Mellow Fish with Russian Sushi-inspired Glaze
description: A flavorful and light fish dish with a sweet and tangy glaze, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a small saucepan, combine honey, rice vinegar, ginger, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Brush the fish fillets with oil and season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Brush the grilled fish with the Russian-inspired glaze during the last minute of cooking.
